source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz 2019년 ROHS/아연도금-Zentra-Z100.PDF

sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for Zentra-Z100 covering RoHS heavy metals Cd, Pb, Hg, and Cr(VI).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports material compliance evidence for RoHS-related heavy metal testing of the submitted Zentra-Z100 sample.
keyPoints: Issued Date is 2018. 08. 30 and Test Report No. is F690101/LF-CTSAYAA18-47943.
The submitted sample was identified as Product Name: Zentra-Z100.
Cadmium, Lead, Mercury, and Hexavalent Chromium results were reported as N.D.
Testing referenced IEC 62321 methods for Cd, Pb, Hg, and Cr(VI).

entities.name: YOUNG-IN PLACHEM
entities.evidence: The following sample(s) was/were submitted and identified by/on behalf of the client as:- YOUNG-IN PLACHEM

entities.name: SGS Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Jeff Jang / Chemical Lab Mgr SGS Korea Co., Ltd.

concepts.name: RoHS heavy metals testing
concepts.evidence: Testing Flow Chart for RoHS:Cd/Pb/Hg/Cr6+ Testing

concepts.name: Cadmium by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013 (Determination of Cadmium by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Lead by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013 (Determination of Lead by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Mercury by ICP-OES
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-4:2013 (Determination of Mercury by ICP-OES)

concepts.name: Hexavalent Chromium testing
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321-7-2:2017, determination of Hexavalent Chromium by Colorimetric Method using UV-Vis

evidence.claim: The document is a test report issued on 2018. 08. 30.
evidence.evidenceText: Issued Date : 2018. 08. 30 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA18-47943

evidence.claim: The SGS file number is AYAA18-47943.
The submitted product name is Zentra-Z100.
Cadmium was not detected at an MDL of 0.5 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Cadmium (Cd) mg/kg N.D. 0.5 With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013

evidence.claim: Lead was not detected at an MDL of 5 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Lead (Pb) mg/kg N.D. 5 With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013

evidence.claim: Mercury was not detected at an MDL of 2 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Mercury (Hg) mg/kg N.D. 2 With reference to IEC 62321-4:2013

evidence.claim: Hexavalent Chromium was not detected at an MDL of 8 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI)* N.D. mg/kg 8 With reference to IEC 62321-7-2:2017

evidence.claim: N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
mg/kg is equivalent to ppm in this report.
The reported results refer only to the tested sample unless otherwise stated.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is general and the document is issued by a testing laboratory, not a regulatory authority.
Test Period text appears inconsistent or reversed: '2018. 08. 30 to 2018. 08. 27'.
No regulatory limits or pass/fail compliance statement are present; the report lists test results only.
OCR/table ordering is imperfect around test period and Hexavalent Chromium result formatting.
